_source: decode_script.item_commits(); SAT-1/op-0x31 physical VM triggers only. K77/K129: thread and routine are engine routing fields, never catalog item ids.
_fields: thread=block+0x04 VM-thread slot; routine=block+0x00 slot-5 routine index; slot=block+0x30 AOT array slot; *_operand records mode, expected value and exact push/value byte offsets in the DECOMPRESSED room blob; op_blob_off is the op-0x31 byte; routine_ordinal is byte-offset order for disassembly bounds; vm_directory_index is the true engine directory identity; routine_start is the decompressed-blob offset; pos=[X,Z] first corner of the SAT-1 trigger quad (rec+4/rec+6 = block+0x24/+0x20 mode-0 literals; builder 0x489880 maps rec+4..rec+0x12 = 4 signed (X,Z) corners; 2026-07-12). Catalog-bearing acquisition records live in item-sources.json.
